Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 157 

MDCD_ACMDTN_PD_AMT 

LABEL: Medicaid Amount Paid for All Accommodation (Room and Board) Revenue Lines 

DESCRIPTION: A code which identifies a specific accommodation, ancillary service or billing calculation (as defined by 
UB-04 Billing Manual). 

SHORT NAME: MDCD_ACMDTN_PD_AMT 

LONG NAME: MDCD_ACMDTN_PD_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims
